tracking_rules.main: Top 3 LESS edges per slate by |edge| magnitude. Plus any MORE with proj − line ≥ 3.0 pts (extreme-MORE rule).
tracking_rules.spotlight: Biggest LESS per slate — the single highest-magnitude LESS edge, tracked as a small separate counter.
tracking_rules.rationale: Focuses tracking on the model's highest-conviction calls per slate rather than a volume-based threshold. Caps call volume at 3 per slate (plus rare extreme MOREs) so card shows signal, not noise. Biggest-LESS spotlight exposes whether the very highest-edge pick each slate hits or busts.

featured_insight.headline: Biggest LESS split 1-1 across N=2 slates
featured_insight.detail: The largest-edge LESS call went opposite ways on each slate: Victor Wembanyama (-3.42 edge, 62.5 line) came in under at 52.5 PP FPTS — HIT. Wendell Carter Jr. (-4.64 edge, 25.0 line) blew past his line at 34.9 PP FPTS AND appeared in bgreseth's $7,500 winning lineup at 1.0% draft% — biggest miss of the NBA slate so far. Broader top-3 LESS per slate: 2/6 hit (33.3%) — below coin flip on tiny N, but the one-sided LESS distribution (no extreme MOREs on either slate) is the pattern to watch.

pp_top_calls.note: Biggest edge of slate, biggest miss — 17 PTS / 7 REB / 5 AST in 37 min, and he was in the winning lineup at just 1.0% draft%
16 PTS / 3 3PM / 3 STL / 1 BLK — stocks alone added 12 PP pts

_notes: NBA grading scope per user direction: top 3 LESS per slate (by |edge| magnitude) plus any MORE with edge ≥ +3, plus a separate biggest-LESS-per-slate spotlight. Narrower than a blanket threshold — 6 tracked calls total on N=2 slates, 2 hits = 33.3%. Honest read on limited data: model's highest-edge LESS calls have been mixed. Biggest-LESS spotlight is 1-1: Wemby was a clean hit (big line, didn't quite reach it), Carter Jr was a bad miss (small line, blew past it). The structural observation from the prior grade still stands — no extreme MORE calls have triggered on either slate (Fox was the only MORE anywhere, at +0.11), meaning the model has systematically projected under the PP line on these 2 games. Worth watching whether that pattern holds as more slates are added. Top Value / Biggest Trap / Hidden Gem categories deferred — NBA showdown ownership simulation needs integration work before those can be graded consistently.
